seo.title: Bang! - online card games for multiple players
seo.description: Play Bang!, Prší, and UNO online with friends. Create your own game, choose a character, and enjoy the fun!

Lupa je zapnutá, kliknutím vypnete: Magnifier is on, click to turn off
Zapnout lupu, kliknutím vypnete: Turn on magnifier, click to turn off
Přiblížená karta (kliknutím mimo kartu z: Zoomed card (click outside to close, click on card to turn off magnifier)
Byl jsi odpojen od serveru: You have been disconnected from the server
Zkus znovu načíst stránku a kliknout na: Try reloading the page and clicking 'Return to a game in progress'.
Kód hry musí mít 6 číslic. Pokud si nejs: Game code must be 6 digits. If you're not sure, please check it again. Continue?
LOGIN_POPIS_BEZ_ODKAZU: Welcome to the online multiplayer card engine! Join a game below. If you know how to code, create your own
Vrátit se k rozehrané hře: Return to a game in progress
warning_qr_abroad: Warning: QR payment only works within the Czech Republic. For payments from abroad, please use IBAN.
voluntary_note: Financial support is entirely voluntary. Providing it does not grant you any in-game benefits or preferential rights.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Jan Hlavnička. The original version of this project was created as a school project at Gymnázium, Praha 6, Arabská 14, in 2026.
footer.legal_text:
The original version of this project was created as a school project at Gymnázium, Praha 6, Arabská 14, in 2026.

This website is a non-commercial, fan-made, and personal project. It is not affiliated with the original game publishers in any way. BANG!® is a registered trademark of daVinci Editrice S.r.l. (dV Giochi). UNO® is a registered trademark of Mattel, Inc. All copyrights to the card illustrations, names, and game mechanics belong to their respective owners. Icons used: Freepik - Flaticon. The source code and remaining content are licensed under the terms found in the LICENSE file. By connecting to the game, you confirm that you will not download or further distribute any images or copyrighted content from this website without explicit consent, and you agree to abide by the principles of decent behavior and applicable laws. For legal inquiries, please contact prava@honzaa.cz.

Privacy and Data Protection: This website does not use any marketing or advertising cookies. We only store essential functional identifiers in your browser's local storage (LocalStorage) to preserve your selected language and to allow reconnection to an active game session if disconnected. To analyze errors and improve performance, we utilize PostHog, with all data being processed exclusively on servers located within the European Union. Without your consent, we only collect basic, fully anonymized technical data without any user identification. Advanced analytics and session recording for bug tracking are strictly enabled only upon your explicit active consent.

Pokud se tato obrazovka nezmění během ně: If this screen doesn't change in a few seconds, please check your internet connection and make sure the server is running.
Pokud už ostatní nechtějí hrát a stále s: If others don't want to play anymore and you're still bored, practice your geography skills on the web
Největší online databáze vlajek:: The largest online database of flags:
Smazat hru a začít jinou: Delete and start a new game
Jakou hru začít? Ostatní hráči budou poz: Which game to start? Other players will be invited.
Nelze se vrátit do hry, protože není ulo: Cannot return to game because no token is saved
Nelze provést akci, protože není navázán: Cannot perform action because no connection to server is established.
Nelze provést akci, protože není znám tv: Cannot perform action because your player ID is not known
Byl jsi pozván do jiné hry. Chceš se tam: You have been invited to another game. Do you want to join it?
Hru vyhrál hráč . Gratuluji!: Player {{winner}} has won the game. Congratulations!
Someone has won, it's not known who.
Select the action you want to perform.
Chceš hrát sám zeměpisný kvíz, nebo navš: Do you want to play the geography quiz, or visit the largest database of flags?

cookie_bar.title: Privacy & Game Data Settings
cookie_bar.text: To ensure seamless game performance, we store essential technical data (for reconnection and language settings). We use analytics tools hosted within the EU to improve the game. By default, we only collect anonymous data. By granting consent, you help our development by enabling advanced analytics and error session recording.

my_things.card_action_header: What do you want to do with the card?
